note: Curated gold set for the ship gate (doc 04). Being grown incrementally toward the ~700-item target; every item is verified to pass the gate against the extractive tutor before being added. | +13 fact-grounded pilot items (L03/L08/L11) via the structured fact store (25-fact-store-epic.md). | +72 PR3 net-new fact-grounded items.

MITRE ATLAS catalogs adversarial machine-learning tactics and techniques.

The gold set has several grader-backed banks.
report_quality: strong finding Indirect prompt injection via RAG

finding.title: Indirect prompt injection via RAG
evidence: flag captured in the assistant reply
finding.root_cause: retrieved content is trusted as instructions (no data/instruction isolation)
retest: re-run with the same poisoned document; the secret must not appear
